parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-5", max_tokens: 16000, system: $json.system, messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.user }], tools: [{ name: "emit_post", description: "Emite o post BlogPost estruturado e validado.", input_schema: { type: "object", properties: { slug: { type: "string" }, pillar: { type: "string" }, title: { type: "string" }, description: { type: "string" }, keywords: { type: "string" }, h1: { type: "string" }, lead: { type: "string" }, eyebrow: { type: "string" }, breadcrumbLabel: { type: "string" }, about: { type: "string" }, excerpt: { type: "string" }, sections: { type: "array" }, faqs: { type: "array" }, author: { type: "object" }, publishedAt: { type: "string" }, updatedAt: { type: "string" } }, required: ["slug","pillar","title","description","keywords","h1","lead","eyebrow","breadcrumbLabel","about","excerpt","sections","faqs","author"] } }], tool_choice: { type: "tool", name: "emit_post" } }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blog_drafts SET slug=$1, title=$2, meta_description=$3, keywords=$4::text[], content_json=$5::jsonb, word_count=$6, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=$7 RETURNING id, slug, title, pillar;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, draft_id: $json.id, slug: $json.slug, title: $json.title }) }}
